name: James Kariuki
text: I needed a reliable pickup for my construction sites. Apex Rides sorted me out within a day — no hassle, fair price.

name: Amina Hassan
text: Our safari vehicles are all sourced through Apex. Clean, well-serviced, and the team responds on WhatsApp immediately.

name: Peter Ngugi
text: Bought my first family car here. The process was simple — viewed it on the website, WhatsApp'd them, and drove off in two days.
